steps: Sample sites have 3 different types A 1 Hospitals 2 Parks 3 Natural region
In one sampling site, choose 5 places as the average
Remove the topsoil, take the soil at a distance of 5-7 cm from the soil surface, and put it into a plastic zipper bag
Mix the soil evenly, and then add soil into 2 separate HDPE plastic bottles 1 bottle with desiccant called “RT” (meaning room temperature); 1 bottle called “Cold”
Put the “Cold” one into the insulated bag; put the “RT” into a backpack
Take 2 pictures: A B 1 1st Take a picture at the sampling site 2 2nd Take another picture at sampling site, and put the recode paper beside
creator: Hsin-Mao Wu
